Why Trust Us

Curated by an Optometrist

Most eyewear brands care about how frames look.
We care about how they perform.

Every MikShey frame is selected by a trained optometrist — checked for lens clarity, UV protection, frame weight and fit. You get frames that look great and protect your eyes.

🔬

Lens Quality Verified

Every lens checked for optical distortion, clarity and UV400 certification before listing.

🛡️

UV400 Protection — Non-Negotiable

Cheap lenses without UV protection cause more eye damage than no sunglasses at all. We never compromise on this.

⚖️

Frame Weight & Fit Assessment

Assessed for nose bridge fit, temple length and wearability — not just aesthetics.

💬

Free Face Shape Consultation

DM us on Instagram with a selfie — we'll tell you which frame suits your face shape. Free, always.
